ddls:
CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "occ_code" TEXT /* Code for the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the occupation */,
  "education_requirements" TEXT /* Typical education level required for the occupation */,
  "experience_requirements" TEXT /* Typical experience level required for the occupation */,
  "job_growth" TEXT /* Projected growth of the occupation */,
  "job_openings" INTEGER /* Number of job openings for the occupation */,
  "industry_sectors" TEXT /* Primary industry sectors where the occupation is found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishments" (
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each establishment */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation reported by the establishment */,
  "num_establishments" INTEGER /* Number of establishments reporting the occupation */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the occupation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the establishment */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the establishment */,
  "establishment_type" TEXT /* Type of establishment (e.g., private, government, non-profit) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the establishment data was added to the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("establishment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishments_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wage_data" (
  "wage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wage data point */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation */,
  "mean_wage" REAL /* Mean wage for the occupation */,
  "lower_one_third" REAL /* Mean of the lower one-third of wages */,
  "upper_two_thirds" REAL /* Mean of the upper two-thirds of wages */,
  "tenth_pct" REAL /* Tenth percentile of wages */,
  "twenty_fifth_pct" REAL /* Twenty-fifth percentile of wages */,
  "median_wage" REAL /* Median wage */,
  "seventy_fifth_pct" REAL /* Seventy-fifth percentile of wages */,
  "hourly_mean_wage" REAL /* Mean hourly wage for the occupation */,
  "hourly_lower_one_third" REAL /* Mean hourly wage of the lower one-third */,
  "hourly_upper_two_thirds" REAL /* Mean hourly wage of the upper two-thirds */,
  "hourly_tenth_pct" REAL /* Tenth percentile of hourly wages */,
  "hourly_twenty_fifth_pct" REAL /* Twenty-fifth percentile of hourly wages */,
  "hourly_seventy_fifth_pct" REAL /* Seventy-fifth percentile of hourly wages */,
  "wage_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the wage data (e.g., survey, government report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_data_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation */,
  "wage" REAL /* Wage of the employee */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., full-time, part-time, unemployed) */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "date_terminated" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours the employee works per week */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits provided to the employee (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment trend */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend */,
  "employment_level" INTEGER /* Employment level (e.g., number of employees) */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the employment trend data (e.g., government report, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wage_history" (
  "wage_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wage history data point */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the wage data */,
  "mean_wage" REAL /* Mean wage for the occupation in the given year */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the wage history data (e.g., government report, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wage_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_history_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, public) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
